runners.formComment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished third at this track in 22.17 last time but the start prior recorded a fast 22.22 over 390m finishing second at this track. Expected to go close with a repeat.

runners.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 390m at this track. Looks tested in this company.

runners.formComment: Nearing another win after her success on March 23 at Shepparton over 450m. Last start was third over 450m in 25.43, behind Analyzation. Thereabouts and rates well in this. Expected to run well.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back at Horsham over 410m in 23.41. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 410m at Horsham at Free For All level. Not keen this time.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 390m at this track in a handy (22.16), beating Urana Storm. Solid chance with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 390m at this track in a handy (22.16), beating Urana Storm. Solid chance with even luck.

runners.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fifth (23.48) at Horsham over 410m. Needs to find a bit more.

runners.formComment: Could manage only fourth last time but caught the eye the start prior when she recorded a dazzling 23.86 over 410m finishing third at Shepparton. Looks the one to beat on run two back.
